all their material and spiritual requirements. Paramahanhsa
Yogananda refers to the wonderful lite of a lady named Girihdld,
who lived an active life without taking any food or drink. The
reason given by her was that her Guru had taught her the mode of
tapping the Sun's rays for her sustenance. Modern science is now
trying to utilize solar energy for heating, lighting etc. as fuel
scarcity is increasing day by day in the world. That is the reason

288 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGY
why the ancient Seers declared in the Rg \eda: "The Sun is the
Soul of all beings, moving and stationary". It does not behove,
therefore, the so-called rationalists to denounce Sun-worship
practised by ancient civilisations all over the world as a super-
stition. Indian thinkers have already affirmed that man is not a
mere body, but a knov\ing, feeling, willing soul residing in a
material body. Even so the Supreme Effulgence is residing in the
orb of the Sun. a huge Ball of Fire.
